endpoints.name: GET /forecast
endpoints.description: Get hourly UV Index Forecast by location and date. Optional altitude, ozone level and datetime could be provided.

endpoints.name: GET /protection
endpoints.description: Get daily protection time by location, UV Index from and UV Index to with 10 minutes accuracy. Optional altitide and ozone level could be provided.

endpoints.name: GET /uv
endpoints.description: Get real-time UV Index by location. Optional altitude, ozone level and datetime could be provided.
